stories.headline: What is a naval blockade and how would it work in Strait of Hormuz?
stories.description: Donald Trump says that the US is going to start blockading the Strait of Hormuz. What does this mean in practice?

stories.headline: Starmer says UK will not support US blockade of Strait of Hormuz
stories.description: Other US allies criticise Trump’s move, including France, Spain and Turkiye, and China also condemns the plan.

stories.headline: Following an election earthquake, Hungary ponders life after Orbán
stories.description: Hungarians consider changes after Orbán's rejection, with Péter Magyar promising reform.

stories.headline: Millions in war-ravaged Sudan surviving on one meal a day, say NGOs
stories.description: Many people resorting to eating leaves and animal feed to survive in North Darfur and South Kordofan states.

stories.headline: US blockade of Iran would worsen global energy crisis, analysts say
stories.description: While US military says it will blockade Iranian ports only, move would have ripples worldwide, according to analysts.
